page: Microsoft Azure E2ds_v6 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine belonging to the Edsv6 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs derived from a single physical core with 2 threads, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8573C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a bundled 118 GB disk, and the instance is premium storage capable. No GPU hardware is included.

Benchmark results demonstrate a divergence between single-core and multi-core capabilities. The single-core performance is notable, with Geekbench single-core scores and single-threaded gzip compression rates registering in the strong tier. However, multi-core performance is limited, as evidenced by a poor stress-ng multi-core CPU score and a weak Geekbench multi-core rating. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with large-block read and write speeds falling into the poor category, although small-block cached reads maintain a weak rating.

Given the 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance provides a high memory density relative to its compute footprint, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require massive parallel processing. The presence of 118 GB of local storage supports workloads requiring temporary data caching. However, the low multi-core and database operation benchmarks indicate that it is less suited for heavy multi-threaded database engines or high-throughput web serving, fitting instead smaller memory-intensive applications, single-threaded processing tasks, and lightweight caching layers.
description: Microsoft Azure E2ds_v6 is an x86_64 virtual machine from the Edsv6 family, powered by a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs (1 physical core, 2 threads). It features 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core, alongside 118 GB of local storage. Benchmark data indicates strong single-core performance, highlighted by high single-threaded gzip compression and Geekbench single-core scores. Conversely, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are weak to poor, as shown by stress-ng and Passmark metrics. This resource profile offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-intensive, low-compute workloads. It is best suited for small memory-bound applications, single-threaded processing, and lightweight caching services rather than highly parallelized database operations or high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E2ds_v6 is an x86_64 VM with 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 118 GB local storage. It features strong single-core performance but limited multi-core scaling, making it suitable for memory-bound tasks.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E2ds_v6 is an x86_64 VM with 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 118 GB local storage, offering strong single-core CPU performance.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high memory density, strong single-core performance, and local storage for memory-bound workloads.
bullet_points: Intel Xeon 8573C processor with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB RAM
Includes 118 GB of local storage with premium storage capabilities
Strong single-core CPU and single-threaded gzip compression performance
Limited multi-core scaling and low uncached memory bandwidth
Best suited for memory-bound, single-threaded workloads and caching
